lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਹੋਆ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ਚੂਕਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis te hoaa tiseh samaanaa chook geaa paasaaraa |4|1|
lines.english: It shall eventually merge back into that from which it came, and all its expanse shall be gone. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee hukam pachhaaniaa se mele haumai sabad jalaae |
lines.english: Those who realize the Hukam of the Lord's Command are united with Him; through the Word of His Shabad, their egotism is burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachee bhagat kareh din raatee sach rahe liv laae |
lines.english: They perform true devotional worship day and night; they remain lovingly attuned to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re hukam man sukh hoe |
lines.english: O mortal, accept His Will and find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਭਾਵਦਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh bhaanaa apanaa bhaavadaa jis bakhase tis bighan na koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God is pleased by the Pleasure of His Own Will. Whomever He forgives, meets no obstacles on the way. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਹਰਿ ਵੇਖਦੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sach har vekhade gur kai sabad subhaae |1|
lines.english: They gaze on their True Lord forever, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, with loving ease. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਭਾ ਧਾਤੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun sabhaa dhaat hai naa har bhagat na bhaae |
lines.english: Under the influence of the three gunas, the three dispositions, the mind wanders everywhere, without love or devotion to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਤਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gat mukat kade na hovee haumai karam kamaeh |
lines.english: No one is ever saved or liberated, by doing deeds in ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਫਿਰਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saahib bhaavai so theeai peiai kirat firaeh |2|
lines.english: Whatever our Lord and Master wills, comes to pass. People wander according to their past actions. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis kee keemat naa pavai kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |
lines.english: The value of such a person cannot be estimated; nothing at all can be said about him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਰਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettiai man mar rahai har naam vasai man aae |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, the mind is overpowered; the Lord's Name comes to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਹੈ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: meraa har prabh agam agochar hai keemat kehan na jaae |
lines.english: My Lord God is Inaccessible and Unfathomable. His value cannot be expressed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੈ ਪਦਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹੋਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chauthai pad vaasaa hoeaa sachai rahai samaae |3|
lines.english: He comes to dwell in the fourth state; he remains merged in the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਸਬਦੇ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee bujheeai sabade kaar kamaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, he comes to understand, and live the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਤੂ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaeh too har har dar sobhaa paae |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੋਈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh koee viralaa boojhai jis no nadar karee |
lines.english: Rare is that person who, as Gurmukh, understands; the Lord has bestowed His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹੀ ਬਖਸੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin daataa koee naahee bakhase nadar karee |
lines.english: There is no Giver except the Guru. He grants His Grace and forgives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਏਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur miliai saant aoopajai anadin naam lee |1|
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, peace and tranquility well up; chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, day and night. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har amrit naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Ambrosial Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh milai naau paaeeai har naame sadaa samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru and the Primal Being, the Name is obtained, and one remains forever absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਵਡਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਹੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai vaddaa rog hai sir maare jamakaal |
lines.english: They are stricken with the great disease of egotism; they are hit on the head by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sadaa vichhurre fireh koe na kis hee naal |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are forever separated from the Lord; no one is with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramat satasangat na vichhurreh anadin naam samaal |2|
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings are never separated from the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. They dwell on the Naam, night and day. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਰਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਤੂ ਨਿਤ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa karataa ek too nit kar dekheh veechaar |
lines.english: You are the One and Only Creator of all. You continually create, watch over and contemplate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਬਖਸੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik guramukh aap milaaeaa bakhase bhagat bhanddaar |
lines.english: Some are Gurmukh - You unite them with Yourself. You bless then with the treasure of devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕਰੀ ਪੂਕਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: too aape sabh kichh jaanadaa kis aagai karee pookaar |3|
lines.english: You Yourself know everything. Unto whom should I complain? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਚਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin har har ucharai gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, night and day, the intuitive peace and poise of the Guru is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam amrit hai nadaree paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is Ambrosial Nectar. By the Lord's Grace, it is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: malaar mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Malaar, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur saalaahee sadaa sukhadaataa prabh naaraaein soee |
lines.english: I praise the Guru, the Giver of peace, forever. He truly is the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam nidhaan hai naame hee chit laae |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam is the greatest treasure. Focus your consciousness on the Naam. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad param pad paaeaa vaddee vaddiaaee hoee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have obtained the supreme status. His glorious greatness is glorious!

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man re guramukh ridai veechaar |
lines.english: O mortal, contemplate the Guru's Word in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin gun gaavai nit saache sach samaavai soee |1|
lines.english: One who sings the Glorious Praises of the True Lord, merges in the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਚਲਣੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taj koorr kuttanb haumai bikh trisanaa chalan ridai samaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Abandon your false family, poisonous egotism and desire; remember in your heart, that you will have to leave. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa raam naam kaa hor daataa koee naahee |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of the Lord's Name. There is no other giver at all.
